creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
The last version of the xserver 1.14 update includes an update to several nvidia-driver ports, including nvidia-driver-173:
https://people.freebsd.org/~dumbbell/graphics/ports-xserver-1.14.patch

This is completely untested as I don't have the required hardware.

Could you please test it?

Note that the patch removes nvidia-driver-71 and nvidia-driver-96 as there is no support for xserver 1.13+.
